main.summary: Information used during DataContract serialization operations.

property.name: NoExceptions
property.summary: Gets a value indicating whether exceptions should be suppressed for the current operation.

property.name: TypeName
property.summary: The logical type name associated with the current serialization operation.

property.name: ID
property.summary: Object identifier associated with the current serialization operation.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Initialize a SerializationData with explicit values.
constructor.param: Logical type name for logging, if available.
Optional identifier for logging, if available.
Effective NoExceptions flag for this operation.

method.name: ForType
method.summary: Create a SerializationData for static or type-only operations.
method.param: Type to associate with the operation.

method.name: ForCommon
method.summary: Create a SerializationData for an instance deriving from Common.
method.param: Instance providing type name, identifier, and exception behavior.
